original: A popular bullpup semi-automatic shotgun with a drum magazine. Its large shell gauge, combined with the bullpup design, provides a good amount of firepower at close quarters, and the revolving drum magazine ensures the shotgun will not jam and can be reloaded quickly.
context: <<POS:06088743>> a Stormbull shotgun",e.tooltip='A popular bullpup semi-automatic shotgun with a drum magazin'
